sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَتْ مَرْيَمُ كَيْفِيَّةَ صِنَاعَةِ الْمُحْتَوَى التَّعْلِيمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Merjem je naučila kako kreirati obrazovni sadržaj.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam learned how to create educational content.

sentences.arabic: تَنْشُرُ مَرْيَمُ مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو عَنْ تَعَلُّمِ اللُّغَاتِ الْجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Merjem objavljuje video snimke o učenju novih jezika.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam publishes video clips about learning new languages.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُهَا آلَافُ الْأَشْخَاصِ لِأَنَّ دُرُوسَهَا بَسِيطَةٌ وَمُفِيدَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Prate je hiljade ljudi jer su njene lekcije jednostavne i korisne.
sentences.translationEn: Thousands of people follow her because her lessons are simple and useful.
